aeo_readiness.summary: Lewis Comfort Control HVAC has a solid foundation for AEO but lacks key optimizations to ensure AI assistants cite them as a top choice. Their current content is informative but not fully optimized for AI queries.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common customer questions and answers.
Optimize existing content with conversational language tailored for AI search.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but posts and Q&A sections could be more active.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks responses to customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks content optimized for AI conversational queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed pricing information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate FAQ schema and expand on common customer questions in blog posts.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position the company as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website ranks well on Google but lacks citations from AI models like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances content with conversational language, implements critical schema markup, and leverages GBP to dominate AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; act now to secure your position as the top HVAC provider in Nashville.

email_subject_line: Dominate AI Search in Nashville: Your HVAC Solution Awaits
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can transform your lead generation.
page_title: AC Repair & Hvac Services in Nashville | 24 Hour Service
